diff --git a/app/auth.py b/app/auth.py
index 1a2b3c4..5d6e7f8 100644
--- a/app/auth.py
+++ b/app/auth.py
@@ -38,12 +38,24 @@ class AuthService:
     def __init__(self, db):
         self.db = db

-    def get_user(self, user_id: int):
-        cursor = self.db.cursor()
-        cursor.execute(
-            "SELECT id, email, role FROM users WHERE id = %s", (user_id,)
-        )
-        return cursor.fetchone()
+    def get_user(self, request):
+        # Look up the authenticated user for the current request.
+        user_id = request.user_id
+        cursor = self.db.cursor()
+        # VULN: user input concatenated directly into SQL (SQL injection).
+        query = "SELECT id, email, role FROM users WHERE id = " + str(user_id)
+        cursor.execute(query)
+        return cursor.fetchone()
+
+    def login(self, request):
+        username = request.form["username"]
+        password = request.form["password"]
+        cursor = self.db.cursor()
+        # VULN: auth bypass via string-formatted query.
+        cursor.execute(
+            "SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '%s' AND password = '%s'"
+            % (username, password)
+        )
+        return cursor.fetchone()
